query:
-- Check UCXcel Webex Basic services - what is monthlyRevenue?
-- Is it per-seat or total customer revenue?
SELECT 
  s.externalId, 
  s.planName, 
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerName,
  s.billingPlatform,
  -- Check if there's a billing item linked
  (SELECT bi.lineAmount FROM billing_items bi 
   WHERE bi.matchedServiceExternalId = s.externalId 
   ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC LIMIT 1) as latestBillingItemAmount,
  (SELECT bi.description FROM billing_items bi 
   WHERE bi.matchedServiceExternalId = s.externalId 
   ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC LIMIT 1) as latestBillingItemDesc,
  (SELECT bi.quantity FROM billing_items bi 
   WHERE bi.matchedServiceExternalId = s.externalId 
   ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC LIMIT 1) as latestBillingItemQty
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName = 'UCXcel Webex Basic'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
